title: Horrorgames
description: Horrorgames – A spooky Minecraft modpack with mystic creatures, eerie events, and performance optimization for smooth, terrifying gameplay.
body:
**Horrorgames** is a modpack that combines horror and performance.
Experience a spooky atmosphere with mystic creatures, eerie sounds, and unexpected events — all enhanced by the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack by Robotkoer for smoother gameplay.

Explore improved world generation with new structures and more detailed terrain.
For the ultimate challenge, play on Hardcore.

_Note: Resource packs and shaders may not be activated by default. If so, please activate them manually._
